kpis.label: Signal → Action Rate
kpis.description: Intelligence signals that converted to strategic decisions or engagements

kpis.label: Gap Closure Velocity
kpis.description: Average gaps moved from Beginning → Current or Current → Desired per week across active engagements

kpis.label: Risk Resolution Rate
kpis.description: Open risks closed within their target SLA window

kpis.label: Pipeline Conversion
kpis.description: Prospects that convert to retained engagements within 90 days of first contact

kpis.label: Decision Accuracy
kpis.description: Strategic decisions that held without reversal or override within 30 days

kpis.label: Agent Utilization
kpis.description: Average productive capacity used across all active agents — targets 75–85% optimal band

adjustmentRules.action: Recalibrate Helena's signal classification criteria — review false-positive sources and tighten sector filters
Helena requires immediate brief with Erik — signal pipeline may be collecting noise, not intelligence
Elias to refine 3-state scoring rubric — check if engagement scope is too broad or scoring criteria are stalling advancement
Engagement review with Marcus — gap closure at critical halt, possible misalignment with client's desired state definition
Anika capacity check — escalate unresolved risks to Ava for workload reallocation
Critical risk backlog — Erik direct review required, risk posture may be deteriorating faster than remediation
Sofia outreach audit — review targeting criteria, proposal quality, and time-to-follow-up metrics
Pipeline crisis — Marcus and Sofia joint strategy session, ICP definition may need revision
Claire to run decision audit — identify reversal patterns and flag for Ava executive review
Decision integrity failure — Erik direct oversight required, all major decisions to be held pending audit
Leo to redistribute workload — identify bottlenecked agents and shift tasks, notify Ava
Capacity emergency — all non-essential tasks suspended, Ava to escalate to Erik for emergency triage
